title: E2E test — verify local launch health poll + browser probe end-to-end
description: Execute end-to-end integration test: (1) run scripts/dev-launch.sh, (2) verify health poll succeeds (curl http://localhost:3001/ returns HTTP 200), (3) verify GET /api/reviews returns JSON, (4) optionally use Cursor browser MCP to navigate browser_probe_url, (5) run docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down, (6) record test results. Test cases: valid .env launch, missing .env, port occupied, /api/reviews response, browser navigate.
notes: Requires Docker daemon and network. If Docker unavailable locally, document as not-executed with rationale. Do NOT modify production deployment. Report results in sprint summary.
